# API Design: [API Name]

## Parent Task / Related Issue
#[issue_number]

## Design Task Description
Design the API contract for [Feature]. This should include:
- Request and Response JSON structures.
- HTTP methods and routes.
- Error codes and validation rules.

## Definition of Done
- [ ] The API structure is documented in the `/docs/api-reference.md` file and in a comment.
- [ ] Frontend team acceptance obtained (confirming they can work with this structure).
- [ ] Architecture approved (@batoriandras).
- [ ] PM approval to begin implementation (@szczukabendeguz).
